name: websets
description: Exa Websets for Claude Code — full MCP server (search/execute/status, 110 ops, 12 workflows, SQLite shadow store, webhook receiver) plus a realtime channel that pushes Webset events into your session.

exa_api_key.title: Exa API key
exa_api_key.description: Required. Get one at https://dashboard.exa.ai. Stored in your system keychain.

exa_webhook_secret.title: Exa webhook secret
exa_webhook_secret.description: Optional HMAC secret for verifying inbound Exa webhook signatures (Exa-Signature header). Leave blank to skip signature verification.

websets_http_port.title: Webhook listener port
websets_http_port.description: Local TCP port the websets process binds for /webhooks/exa intake and /webhooks/events SSE. The channel reads this same port. Change if 7860 is taken.

websets_db_path.title: SQLite database path
websets_db_path.description: Path to the local Websets shadow store (items, annotations, events, companies). Defaults to the plugin's persistent data directory.

compat_mode.title: Operation compat mode
compat_mode.description: How strictly callOperation() coerces arguments. 'safe' is forgiving; 'strict' rejects ambiguous inputs.
